title: Shalamite
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Shalamites''' were the inhabitants of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shalam]].

One Shalamite was [[King/Legends|King]] [[Gareth (king)|Gareth]], a known cheater at [[Laro]].

==Behind the scenes==
It is unclear whether Shalamites were a species or subgrouping.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Last One Standing: The Tale of Boba Fett|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1stm}}
